description: Sets the fuel consumption coefficient, which is a multiplier of the [[CfgVehicles_Config_Reference#fuelConsumptionRate|fuel consumption rate]] in config. It doesn't affect fuel leakage or refueling.
examples: <sqf>myTank setFuelConsumptionCoef 10; // consume 10x more fuel than default</sqf>
name: setFuelConsumptionCoef

Item.desc: Values larger than 1 increase fuel consumption, and values between 0 and 1 decrease fuel consumption. 0 disables fuel consumption
Item.name: coef
